one_time_description: CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative contribution of $4,414,435 received, resulting in large deferred revenue and inflated revenue recognition in 2021
economic_notes: Nation has investments in Shackan Development Corporation (100%), K'en T'em Limited Partnership (12.50%), and Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership, accounted for using modified equity method. Ottawa Trust Fund held by Government of Canada with capital and revenue trust monies.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Large one-time CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative funding of $4,414,435 received in 2021 significantly inflated revenue and accumulated surplus. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (Shackan Development Corporation, K'en T'em LP, Spayum Holdings LP). No schedule of remuneration included. Accounts receivable balance not separately disclosed on face of balance sheet. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($1,842,913) minus other government transfers ($3,582,069 less ISC = $1,739,156 other govt) = $1,559,213. Total government transfers = ISC $1,842,913 + other government $3,582,069 = $5,424,982. Audit report signed August 16, 2022, over a year after year-end.
